creator: sheldonh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The FreeBSD problem report database isn't the right place to raise this 
issue. It's either a Netscape problem or an XFree86 problem. You should 
take the issue up with a forum specific to one of those. For what it's 
worth, I can't reproduce the problem using Netscape 3.04 and 
XFree86-3.3.3.1 .
